query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as lista2_count 
FROM subscribers 
WHERE status = 'active' 
AND subscribedAt >= '2026-05-10 00:00:00';

SELECT COUNT(*) as lista1_count
FROM subscribers 
WHERE status = 'active' 
AND subscribedAt < '2026-05-10 00:00:00';
